
## 📝 Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

Fixes # (issue number)

## 💡 Type of Change

- [ ] 🚀 Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] 🐞 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (documentation, build tasks, etc.)
- [ ] ⚡️ Performance (code optimization)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code restructuring without functional changes)
- [ ] 🧪 Test (adding or fixing tests)

## 🛠 Tech Stack Involved

- [ ] 🧩 Shared Module (Kotlin)
- [ ] 🤖 Android App (Compose)
- [ ] 🍎 iOS App (SwiftUI)

## ✅ Checklist

### General
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (linted with Ktlint/Detekt).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.

### Android (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on an Android Emulator or Physical Device.
- [ ] UI follows Material 3 guidelines (Compose).

### iOS (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested on an iOS Simulator or Physical Device.
- [ ] UI follows Human Interface Guidelines (SwiftUI).

### Tests
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.

## 📸 Screenshots / Videos (if applicable)

*If this PR involves UI changes, please provide screenshots or screen recordings (Android/iOS).*
